mapper.select: SELECT id, parent_id AS parentId, menu_name AS menuName, menu_type AS menuType, path, component, perms, icon, sort_order AS sortOrder, visible, create_time AS createTime FROM sys_menu WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC

SELECT DISTINCT m.perms FROM sys_menu m INNER JOIN sys_role_menu rm ON rm.menu_id = m.id AND rm.deleted = 0 INNER JOIN sys_user_role ur ON ur.role_id = rm.role_id AND ur.deleted = 0 WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND m.deleted = 0 AND m.perms IS NOT NULL AND m.perms != ''
SELECT rm.menu_id FROM sys_role_menu rm WHERE rm.role_id = #{roleId} AND rm.deleted = 0
